"""
p = Path('tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/relay_watch.py')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
if 'CURATOR_DISPATCH' not in text:
    text = text.replace('MAILBOX_POLL = ROOT / "tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/mailbox_poll.py"', 'MAILBOX_POLL = ROOT / "tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/mailbox_poll.py"\nCURATOR_DISPATCH = ROOT / "tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/curator_claude_dispatch.py"')
if 'def dispatch_curator()' not in text:
    text = text.replace('def poll_mailbox():\n    if MAILBOX_POLL.exists():\n        run(f"python3 {MAILBOX_POLL}")', 'def dispatch_curator():\n    if CURATOR_DISPATCH.exists():\n        run(f"python3 {CURATOR_DISPATCH}")\n\ndef poll_mailbox():\n    if MAILBOX_POLL.exists():\n        run(f"python3 {MAILBOX_POLL}")')
if 'dispatch_curator()\n        poll_mailbox()' not in text:
    text = text.replace('while True:\n        poll_mailbox()', 'while True:\n        dispatch_curator()\n        poll_mailbox()')
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
ops_applied.append('wired curator dispatcher into relay_watch loop')
